testTarget.reason: Audio playback is essential for listening practice — no tests exist. Priority hooks (useAudioPlayer, useFurigana, useChatSession) are already covered; AudioPlayer is the first missing critical component.

refactorCandidate.reason: Large component (555 lines), no tests, mixes UI and logic. Largest of the task-listed refactor candidates.

notes: Frontend: 68 tests, Backend: 35 tests. All priority hooks (useAudioPlayer, useFurigana, useChatSession) are covered. VoiceRecorder is now a thin 11-line wrapper — not a refactor candidate. ReadingMode refactored from 555 lines into 8 focused files: types, constants, hook, FuriganaDisplay, PassageList, ReadingView, QuestionsView, ResultsView, and thin container (ReadingMode.tsx).
